message:
🌱 Add capsule: support namespace labeling for tenant owners mission (#1170)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,79 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "capsule-407-support-namespace-labeling-for-tenant-owners",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "capsule: support namespace labeling for tenant owners",
+    "description": "support namespace labeling for tenant owners. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current capsule deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your capsule version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n capsule -l app.kubernetes.io/name=capsule\nhelm list -n capsule 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working capsule installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review capsule configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant capsule configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n capsule -l app.kubernetes.io/name=capsule\nkubectl get configmap -n capsule -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=capsule\n```\nCurrent capsule and capsule-proxy implementations deny namespace labeling for tenant owners."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for support namespace labeling for tenant owners",
+        "description": "will add documentation tomorrow :)\n```yaml\napiVersion: capsule.clastix.io/v1beta1\nkind: Tenant\nmetadata:\n  name: oil\nspec:\n  owners:\n  - name: alice\n    kind: User\n  namespaceOptions:\n    allowedLabels:\n     - myorg.net/foo\n     - someother.com/bar\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n capsule -l app.kubernetes.io/name=capsule\nkubectl get events -n capsule --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"support namespace labeling for tenant owners\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "See the fix PR for the community-verified solution: https://github.com/projectcapsule/capsule/pull/423",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "apiVersion: capsule.clastix.io/v1beta1\nkind: Tenant\nmetadata:\n  name: oil\nspec:\n  owners:\n  - name: alice\n    kind: User\n  namespaceOptions:\n    allowedLabels:\n     - myorg.net/foo\n     - someother.com/bar",
+        "apiVersion: capsule.clastix.io/v1beta1\nkind: Tenant\nmetadata:\n  name: oil\nspec:\n  owners:\n  - name: alice\n    kind: User\n  namespaceOptions:\n    userLabels:\n      allowed:\n        - myorg.net/foo\n      allowedRegex: ^\\w+-lb$\n      protected:\n        - protected.net/bar\n    userAnnotations:\n      allowed:\n        - myorg.net/foo\n      allowedRegex: ^\\w+-lb$\n      protected:\n        - protected.net/bar",
+        "type NamespaceOptions struct {\n\t//+kubebuilder:validation:Minimum=1\n\t// Specifies the maximum number of namespaces allowed for that Tenant. Once the namespace quota assigned to the Tenant has been reached, the Tenant owner cannot create further namespaces. Optional.\n\tQuota *int32 `json:\"quota,omitempty\"`\n\t// Specifies additional labels and annotations the Capsule operator places on any Namespace resource in the Tenant. Optional.\n\tAdditionalMetadata *AdditionalMetadataSpec `json:\"additionalMetadata,omitempty\"`\n\t// Specifies forbidden a labels the Tenant owner can't place on Namespace resources in the Tenant. Optional.\n\tUserLabels *ForbiddenListSpec `json:\"userLabels,omitempty\"`\n\t// Specifies forbidden annotations the Tenant owner can't place on Namespace resources in the Tenant. Optional.\n\t"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "capsule",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "capsule"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Namespace"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "sandbox",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/projectcapsule/capsule/issues/407",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/projectcapsule/capsule",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/projectcapsule/capsule/pull/423"
+    },
+    "reactions": 1,
+    "comments": 14,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with capsule installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-15T06:34:37.024Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
